name: dropdown-menu
description: An actions menu that opens under a button — the ARIA menu pattern with roving tabindex, full keyboard support, outside-click dismiss and focus restored to the trigger.

notes: Trigger exposes aria-haspopup=menu and aria-expanded, labelling the role=menu via aria-labelledby
Items are role=menuitem with roving tabindex; disabled items carry aria-disabled and are skipped
Arrow keys move, Home/End jump, Enter/Space select, Escape and Tab close and restore focus to the trigger
A click outside the trigger or menu dismisses it

intents: an actions menu that opens under a button
an ARIA menu with menu items and separators
examples:
<DropdownMenu label="Actions">
  <MenuItem onSelect={() => edit()}>Edit</MenuItem>
  <MenuSeparator />
  <MenuItem onSelect={() => remove()} disabled>Delete</MenuItem>
</DropdownMenu>
